rationale: Educ. Code §37.123 governs disruptive activities on school campuses and has no relation to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 37.123. DISRUPTIVE ACTIVITIES. (a) A person commits an offense if the person, alone or in concert with others, intentionally engages in disruptive activity on the campus or property of any private or public school.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
